Take a breath, slow down, and enjoy the simple satisfaction of solving.
This very easy large print Sudoku book is designed for a calm, comfortable solving experience—perfect for seniors, beginners, or anyone looking to relax and unwind with simple, approachable puzzles.

From the Publisher
Relax & Solve puzzle books from Publications International Ltd. 
Brain Games Relax and Solve series is designed to be fun and relaxing without intimidating the stressed-out brain while still exercising your mind! 
With over 80 puzzles, these word searches are perfect for those times when you just need to get away from it all. With word search variants like Light Reading that consist of answers relating to the themes of famous novels, you'll never get bored! 
Working out your brain has never been so intriguing-- and fun! Brain Games Relax and Solve Crosswords has over 80 puzzles with a variety of themes, including movies, television, literature, art, landmarks, anagrams, sports, and more! 
Including Sudoku in your mix of puzzles will help keep your brain fit and flexible. And don't be scared off by all the numbers: There's no math involved in these brain exercises--only logic. Take a breath and de-stress with Brain Games Relax and Solve Sudoku.

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: First the positives: the puzzles are cute and sometimes require real searching which I have enjoyed. I’ve enjoyed even more so the pages you have to figure out the words first in order to determine what it is you’re searching for. And I thought I wouldn’t like that part but I actually really do. Requires my brain to operate in a different way than just searching for words and I like that. Love that it’s spiral bound - once you go spiral you just don’t go back if you can help it. Pretty layout, I enjoy the botanical sketching throughout the pages.The cons: I really wish the words you’re searching for and the word search puzzle itself were in the same page rather than next to one another (see photo). I’m also not a fan of when the puzzle is shorter (not as many words to find), the print of the letters is ginormous. Unnecessary. But I could look over both of these very slight inconveniences, if the paper was better. Idk, call me old school but I miss paper paper. Like the kind you used to color on. This paper you need to use a pencil on as the ink takes a few minutes to dry onto. Unable to use crayons or anything of that (waxy) nature. That’s probably my biggest complaint.

products.bookDescription:
Are you looking for a fun and relaxing way to exercise your memory?
This adult activity book provides hours of easy memory activities for adults.
There is an excellent variety of activities in this book including:
Short-term memory: Enjoy many fun and easy short-term memory activities including Delightful Details, Particular Pictures, Silly Sentences, Backwards and Terrific Lists.
Short-term memory: Enjoy many fun and easy short-term memory activities including Delightful Details, Particular Pictures, Silly Sentences, Backwards and Terrific Lists.

Long-term memory: Give your long-term recall a gentle workout with a variety activities including Lovely Memories, Cool Categories, Starts With, and Complete It.

Classic Easy Puzzles & Brain Games: Have fun and exercise your brain with several classic puzzles such as Word Search, Spot the Odd the One Out, Find the Differences, Well Made Words and Two of a Kind.
All together, there is a wonderful variety of memory actives and puzzles in this book!
Would you like a more detailed overview? Then read on…
This memory book is written by J.D. Kinnest, the author of the popular memory book The Fun and Easy Memory Activity Book for Adults, as well as several other puzzle books.
To create fun and intriguing memory activities and puzzles, the book has seven sections each one of which that has a specific theme such as:
Around the House
Around the House
Arts & Crafts
Arts & Crafts
Our Beautiful Earth
Our Beautiful Earth
Love of Animals
Love of Animals
In each section, there are short-term memory activities, long-term recall activities and classic puzzles that are based around the theme.
Other fun and useful features in this book include large-print and clear images, as well as easy-to-use solutions.
Enjoy hours of fun and mental exercise with this delightful memory book.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: A great mix of mathematical, logical, and word puzzles!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I had been looking for something to wind down with at night before bed and I've always been partial to logic puzzles/sudoku.  I LOVE this book and the mix of puzzles.  There around 20 different types of puzzles in this book ranging from sudoku (and several variations of sudoku), mazes, multiple types of word puzzles, and some visual puzzles that I had never seen before.  The puzzles are largely in the intermediate to advanced level of difficulty.  The standard Sudoku puzzles are not too challenging, but they are definitely among the easiest of the lot.  Many of the puzzles would likely be frustrating for beginners and pretty challenging for casual puzzlers (a satisfying level of challenge mostly!).  Those most proficient at puzzling would still get a good challenge on many of these puzzles.  I'd consider myself somewhere between the casual puzzler and almost expert... but I still had to write off a few of these puzzles as I made a mistake early on and am using a pen.  I'm not too worried about it, there are so many puzzles and I am confident that I will either repurchase down the road or get another product from this publisher.As for the quality of the book, the binder is such a huge advantage.  I can lay on the bed with this book comfortably and not worry about needing a book tray or anything.  The paper quality is thick enough that even using a pen, I never notice my writing on the other side of the page when I flip over to the next puzzle.All in all, its an excellent product, satisfying difficulty level and intriguing mix of puzzles.  Add in a price of roughly $10?  Its a steal of a deal.  A great gift for those proficient in puzzling (though NOT FOR BEGINNERS) ---5/5 Stars---

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Lesson learned was to examine " SEE SAMPLE PAGE" before purchase.
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: The good news is that you get your 1,000 puzzles.Was purchased for my wife and here is what we discussed:I don't like this...pauseWhy?There isn't any room for my numbers.What?There are so many puzzles stuffed on one page there isn't room for me to write in the margins.Ok, what else?There isn't an answer page.You mean diagrams with the finished puzzles ?Yes.Anything else?Since there are so many on a page they are hard to see and work.OK, Should I return it?Yes...If you're a Sudoku fan this probably makes sense.AMAZON is stunning in dealing with customer service and handled this to our satisfaction.From my side there are large pages which may or may not be useable, I'd like to see far fewer per page and more pages.When watching her solve Sudokus I sometimes observe her checking the back for finished puzzle.This may or may not be important to you.Returned to the original ad and looked around.Found a READ SAMPLE button which actually does show a actual page.Had we used this initially another book would have been selected.So I'm partially to blame.If you want anything over the 1,000 (1000+ advertised) you have to go online and download/print them.My choices are in one star increments so I gave four.Given other options it would be 4.5

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Good Sudoku book for beginners.  The "easy" puzzles have been so absurdly simple (even worked "the hard way") that they are fairly worthless for a seasoned solver.  "The hard way" for me: count the ones and nines, whichever there a fewer of, start by working that number until all 9 are filled in, without writing in any other numbers.  If I start with ones, then I fill in the twos next, then threes, etcetera, until all the remaining blanks are the nines.  This makes a reasonably easy puzzle to be more like a medium (or even a hard puzzle sometimes).

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: If you listen to any review, listen to mine. I’ve bought volume 1 and volume 2 of this brand at least 5 or 6 times and gotten them as presents multiple times.These are the only sudoku books I use. I’ve been doing sudoku multiple times a day for over a decade now. The size of the book, puzzles, and numbers is great (if you like bolder font, choose volume 2!). The difficulty is great, especially if you like hard ones! The easy ones are too easy for me but I do them anyway. Then the hard ones are great.The ONE issue: I KNOW these are cheaper books and that’s the reason I buy them. HOWEVER, if they just made the spiral spine more sturdy, this book would be perfect. You can see in my first picture that the spiral has come out a little bit in the back and it’s annoying cause the pages come out very easily at that point.Otherwise, dope product. Will continue to buy multiples at a time in case they ever stop making them. I’ve gotten two friends to purchase these cause they are great.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Best puzzle book I’ve ever had!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Best puzzle book ever! If I could give it 100 stars, I would. I love puzzle books and was looking for something to keep me busy for 20 hours in the car. This is THE book. I love the variety of puzzles, keeping me engaged The difficulty is perfect, not too easy not to hard. I love the themes of each chapter, the depth of knowledge is fun! Please make a sequel!! 🙏🙏
